key.name: highlight-fill-color
key.description: RGBA color used for OCR highlight fill.

key.name: highlight-border-color
key.description: RGBA color used for OCR highlight borders.

key.name: highlight-shadow-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the drop shadow rendered under OCR highlights.

key.name: highlight-padding
key.description: Extra pixels added around each OCR box.

key.name: highlight-radius
key.description: Rounded corner radius used for OCR highlights.

key.name: highlight-border-width
key.description: Stroke width of the OCR highlight outline.

key.name: ocr-enabled
key.description: Enable OCR processing and highlight rendering in the screenshot UI.

key.name: selection-confidence
key.description: Minimum confidence used for the selected-area OCR pass.

key.name: selection-max-edge
key.description: Maximum long edge for the selected-area OCR image.

key.name: ocr-languages
key.description: Tesseract language codes to use for OCR processing.

key.name: close-after-copy
key.summary: Close screenshot tool after copying OCR text
key.description: Automatically close the screenshot UI once OCR text is copied to the clipboard.

key.name: search-engine
key.description: The search engine to use for the OCR 'Search' button.

key.name: show-google-lens-button
key.description: Show the Google Lens button in the screenshot UI.

key.name: show-qr-button
key.description: Show the QR code button in the screenshot UI.
